evidence_location: Bromomethylation section, paragraph on sulfolane solvent
evidence_quote: Sulfolane is a polar aprotic solvent that is chemically and thermally stable, miscible with water and organic solvents, and does not damage PS. Therefore, it is an ideal solvent for performing many different reactions on the surface of PS plates, although its relatively high melting point (28 °C) introduces some difficulties in handling.
